ModMetaData.name: RimSynapse - StoryTeller
ModMetaData.author: RimSynapse Team
ModMetaData.description:
[h1]RimSynapse - StoryTeller[/h1] [b]📚 [url=https://github.com/RimSynapse/RimSynapse-StoryTeller/wiki]Official Wiki & Documentation[/url][/b]
[b]Companion Mod for RimSynapse.[/b] Intercepts standard storytelling events, raids, and quests to generate rich, contextual, multi-stage narratives via the LLM.
[h2]Compatibility Matrix[/h2] [list] [*] [b]Royalty DLC:[/b] Compatible & Optional. Generates arrogant noble decrees and custom empire quests. [*] [b]Ideology DLC:[/b] Compatible & Optional. Reframes quests as holy crusades and divine visions. [*] [b]Biotech DLC:[/b] Compatible & Optional. Describes mechanitor threats as cold satellite broadcasts. [*] [b]Anomaly DLC:[/b] Compatible & Optional. Translates events into chilling whispers and void phenomena. [/list]
